config.script:
try:

		scriptName = 'Location On Action Performed'
					
		SelctedRow=self.view.params.rowIndex
		columnName=self.view.params.column	
		rowData=self.view.params.rowData
		system.perspective.print("selected value %s"%self.props.selected)
		if self.props.selected == 1 or self.props.selected == True:
		 	no=True
	 	else:
	 		no=False
		system.perspective.print("SelctedRow "+str(SelctedRow))
		system.perspective.print("columnName "+str(columnName))
		system.perspective.print("no "+str(no))
		if self.view.params.messageName == 'rowSelectionHolded':
			messageType = 'UpdateHeldOrders'
		else:
			messageType = 'UpdateCreatedOrder'
		system.perspective.sendMessage(messageType, payload = {"columnName":columnName,"No":no,"SelctedRow":SelctedRow}, scope = "page")
			
	except: 
	#start of except block  
		screenName ='Order Management'   
		filePath=str('Project_VECV/Order/Subview')  
		errorFunction = str('Event:onStartup  -> Subview')  
		errorType=str('Application')  
		errorCode = str(Project_VECV.Common.GenerateUUID.getUniqueUUID())   
		description=str(sys.exc_info()[1]) #error description 
		lineNumber=str(sys.exc_info()[2].tb_lineno) #lineno on which error 
		Project_VECV.Configuration.Common.AddLogDetails.AddErrorLogs(screenName,filePath,errorFunction,errorType,errorCode,description,lineNumber)

messageHandlers.script:
# implement your handler here
	self.props.selected = False
